mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO recommendation_logs
user_id, post_id, scene, score, rank_pos, is_clicked, created_at,
#{userId}, #{postId}, #{scene}, #{score}, #{rankPos}, #{isClicked}, #{createdAt},
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, post_id, scene, score, rank_pos, is_clicked, created_at FROM recommendation_logs WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, user_id, post_id, scene, score, rank_pos, is_clicked, created_at FROM recommendation_logs
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM recommendation_logs WHERE created_at >= #{start} AND is_clicked = 1

SELECT scene AS scene, COUNT(1) AS exposureCount, SUM(CASE WHEN is_clicked = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS clickCount FROM recommendation_logs WHERE created_at >= #{start} GROUP BY scene ORDER BY exposureCount DESC, scene ASC

SELECT rl.post_id AS postId, MAX(p.title) AS title, COUNT(1) AS exposureCount, SUM(CASE WHEN rl.is_clicked = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS clickCount FROM recommendation_logs rl LEFT JOIN posts p ON p.id = rl.post_id WHERE rl.created_at >= #{start} GROUP BY rl.post_id ORDER BY exposureCount DESC, clickCount DESC, postId DESC LIMIT #{limit}
